247757437.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
247757437.jp_real: 絶対無敵というわけでもあるまい
247757437.english: Even the mightiest fortress has its cracks.

88057380.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
88057380.en_literal: One step at a time. I'll definitely do it.
88057380.english: Each small step brings us closer to giant victory!

286307326.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
286307326.jp_real: アシシカトドカナイノナラアシカラタタクゾ
286307326.en_literal: If I can't reach you with my fists, I'll kick you!
286307326.english: Come on, everyone! Let's break a leg!

753424137.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
753424137.jp_real: 勝利は目前だが、気を抜くなよ
753424137.en_literal: Victory is near, but don't let your guard down.
753424137.english: Don't collapse right before the finish line!

707715119.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_B
707715119.jp_real: まだだ！もう一度行くぞ！
707715119.en_literal: Not yet! Let's go one more time!
707715119.english: Hold the celebrations! We must make another push!

675447917.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
675447917.jp_real: ようやくここまで来たな。あと少しだ。
675447917.en_literal: I've finally made it this far. Just a little more.
675447917.english: What a nice view. I can see our victory from up here.

477890942.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
477890942.jp_real: こんなもので足止めできると思わないことだ
477890942.en_literal: I don't think something like this can stop me.
477890942.english: It'll take more than this to stop us! Much more!

519163478.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
519163478.jp_real: 意思なき攻撃など通用しない
519163478.english: When one has no reason to fight, they've already lost.

487497335.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
487497335.en_literal: I'm focusing my attack on the legs!

1066361395.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
1066361395.jp_real: 大層な兵器だが、破壊する！
1066361395.en_literal: A mighty weapon... I'll destroy it!
1066361395.english: Should've left your toys at home if you didn't want them broken!

131975320.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
131975320.jp_real: 悪いが、ここで止まるわけにはいかんのでな。
131975320.en_literal: I'm sorry, but I can't stop here.
131975320.english: You're gravely mistaken if you think you can stop us!

649953296.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
649953296.jp_real: 率直に言う。連携の練度が足りんのではないか、将軍。
649953296.en_literal: Frankly, don't you think our coordination is lacking, General?
649953296.english: My advice to you, generals—work on your coordination.

823291376.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
823291376.jp_real: なぜそこまでしてリリスに仕える
823291376.english: Why do you still insist on serving Lilith?

19121910.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
19121910.jp_real: 互いの強弱をかけた戦いか
19121910.english: We've been thrust into a clash with titans!

1057867598.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
1057867598.jp_real: いい流れだ。今度こそは。
1057867598.en_literal: Good flow. This time for sure...
1057867598.english: The tide of battle flows in our favor!

1010526788.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
1010526788.jp_real: イドを倒せねば先へは進めんか
1010526788.en_literal: If I can't defeat Id, can I even move forward?
1010526788.english: Must defeat Id to press on!

491694041.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
491694041.jp_real: ニューゴロシの本領発揮と行くか？
491694041.en_literal: I'll go with the full power of New World Slayer.
491694041.english: I'll show you why they call me Dragon Slayer!

206336661.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
206336661.jp_real: まったく、お互い業が深い
206336661.english: In truth, we're more alike than you know.

53443717.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
53443717.jp_real: 蹴りを付けようじゃないか
53443717.en_literal: Let's put the finishing touches on this.
53443717.english: It all comes down to this!

654724088.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
654724088.jp_real: その力…お前は何を背負っている
654724088.en_literal: That power... What are you carrying?
654724088.english: Have you always shouldered this power... this burden?

399294035.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
399294035.jp_real: 以前の戦いを思い出せ！動きに対応できるはずだ！
399294035.en_literal: Remember the battles of old. We should be able to respond to their moves.
399294035.english: Remember the strategies we've learned along the way!

1048716484.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
1048716484.jp_real: 手を抜ける相手ではないようだ
1048716484.en_literal: He's not someone you can slip past.
1048716484.english: Can't afford to take this one lightly!

22075644.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
22075644.jp_real: わずかな隙を見逃すな！
22075644.en_literal: Don't miss even the slightest opening!
22075644.english: If you see an opening, take it!

517783519.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
517783519.jp_real: 相手にとって不足はない
517783519.en_literal: I have no shortage of tricks for my opponent.
517783519.english: We need only triumph once more!

505465337.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
505465337.en_literal: Let me put you to sleep.

383710023.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
383710023.jp_real: 立ちふさがるのならば、斬るのみ！
383710023.en_literal: If you stand in my way... I'll cut you down!
383710023.english: That was your final warning! Now answer to my blade!

770962653.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
770962653.jp_real: 以前と同じ要領で食らいつくんだ！
770962653.en_literal: I'll crush you with the same power as before!
770962653.english: We've slain it once! We can slay it again!

286543573.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
286543573.en_literal: Heh. You've gotten used to it.
286543573.english: Hah! I know all your tricks!

982403638.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
982403638.en_literal: Alright! That was a good fight!

855816378.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
855816378.jp_real: ガランツァ将軍に続くぞ！

929333838.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
929333838.jp_real: 足場には気をつけてくれよ
929333838.english: Be careful where you step, everyone!

829609564.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
829609564.jp_real: ここを突破し、リリスの元へ急がねばな
829609564.en_literal: I must break through here and hurry to Lilith.
829609564.english: Once we put out this fire, all that's left is Lilith.

140079367.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
140079367.jp_real: 何度立ち阻かろうとも同じことだ
140079367.en_literal: No matter how many times I rise again, it's the same thing.
140079367.english: Mountains and deserts couldn't stop us. What chance do you have?

6464216.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
6464216.jp_real: 我が剣、この空のために振るわん！
6464216.en_literal: My sword shall tremble for this sky!
6464216.english: I wield my sword for the sake of the skies!

689347568.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
689347568.jp_real: リリスの隙にはサセン！
689347568.en_literal: I won't let you get away with that!
689347568.english: Your reign of terror is over, Lilith!

259164310.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
259164310.jp_real: いける！攻撃の手を休めるな！
259164310.en_literal: I can do it! I can rest my hand from attacking!

593444139.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
593444139.jp_real: アンラマンユウ！今度こそ鎮めさせてもらおう！
593444139.en_literal: Unleash Manigance! This time, I'll make you sink for good!
593444139.english: Your end is come, Angra Mainyu!

435666129.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
435666129.jp_real: 俺たちの全てを、この戦いにぶつけるんだ！
435666129.en_literal: I'll throw everything we've got into this fight!
435666129.english: We've come so far. This is it, everyone!

134937348.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
134937348.jp_real: 救済を謳い、異形となり果てるなど、小死！
134937348.en_literal: I sing of salvation, and become a heretic. Show me!
134937348.english: Don't make me laugh. No one believes in your twisted vision of salvation!

675183551.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
675183551.jp_real: 絆の力…心地よいものだな。
675183551.en_literal: The power of bonds... it's a pleasant feeling.
675183551.english: From the links we've forged flows boundless strength!

305207324.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
305207324.jp_real: イド、聞こえているんだろう？
305207324.en_literal: Ido! You can hear me, right?
305207324.english: Id! I know you can hear us!

843297713.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
843297713.jp_real: 銃の血が反応している
843297713.english: What is my dragon blood reacting to?

1045965163.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
1045965163.jp_real: 一部のスキも見逃すな！
1045965163.en_literal: Don't overlook even a single opening.

352955418.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
352955418.jp_real: 竜殺しの剣を、かの破壊の龍に向けることになるとはな。
352955418.en_literal: To think I'd have to point the Dragon Slayer's sword at the Dragon of Annihilation...
352955418.english: Dragon Slayer versus Dragon of Destruction. I didn't see that coming.

112081824.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
112081824.jp_real: 極龍のオアギトで神喰らカン！
112081824.en_literal: With the Dragon's Agito, I'll crush you!
112081824.english: Feel the fang of the black dragon!

6326408.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
6326408.jp_real: 引き続き仕掛ける！お前たちは警戒を！
6326408.en_literal: I'll keep pressing the attack. You all stay alert.
6326408.english: Stay on your guard! This battle isn't over yet!

717368835.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_1_FIRST
717368835.english: This man is the real deal!

1039386812.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
1039386812.en_literal: I have to hurry to the back.
1039386812.english: We shouldn't linger on trivial fights.

694850493.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
694850493.jp_real: 今のような連携を維持しよ
694850493.en_literal: Let's keep up this kind of synergy.
694850493.english: They'll crumble under our united assault!

651068350.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
651068350.en_literal: I'll get out of the way.

1043161405.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
1043161405.jp_real: 何センカ！俺から離れるんだ！
1043161405.en_literal: Nonsense! You're not getting away from me!
1043161405.english: This is chaotic! Stay close to me!

861992332.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
861992332.jp_real: 視界が悪い。周囲に警戒を。
861992332.en_literal: My sight's poor. I'll shield you.
861992332.english: Poor visibility can lead to death. Watch your flanks.

636999054.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
636999054.jp_real: 彼女に魔物を近づけなければいいのだろ？
636999054.en_literal: I just have to keep the monsters away from her, right?
636999054.english: Protect the Overseer! I can handle that!

433121244.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
433121244.jp_real: ルリアを救うため、前へ進もう！
433121244.en_literal: I'll move forward to save Lyria.

164445306.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
164445306.jp_real: 見事な連携だ！お前たち！

323645419.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
323645419.jp_real: 大した相手ではないはずだ
323645419.en_literal: He shouldn't be much of a challenge.
323645419.english: They weren't much to speak of.

131320363.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
131320363.jp_real: 俺たちの相手ではない
131320363.english: We can't waste our time on you lot!

536154267.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
536154267.jp_real: 道を空けてもらおうか
536154267.en_literal: Should I clear a path for you?

837540285.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
837540285.jp_real: 激しい抵抗が来る！気を引き締めていくぞ！
837540285.en_literal: I'm feeling intense resistance. Let's tighten our focus!
837540285.english: Their forces are strong. Expect fierce resistance.

1053564579.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
1053564579.jp_real: 相手が何であろうと、退けるのみだ。
1053564579.en_literal: No matter what the opponent is, I'll just clear them out.
1053564579.english: Leave only the dead in our wake!

450328749.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
450328749.jp_real: 今こそ騎士の矜持を忘れないようにしないとな
450328749.en_literal: Now's the time to remember the knight's pride.
450328749.english: Dig deep! Now more than ever!

374046044.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
374046044.jp_real: おとなしく登らせてくれはしないだろうな
374046044.en_literal: I won't let you climb up so easily.
374046044.english: So much for an uneventful hike to the top.

877084594.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
877084594.jp_real: 俺たちの理解の及ばない場所のようだな
877084594.en_literal: Seems like a place beyond our comprehension.
877084594.english: Have we wandered into a waking nightmare?

605707787.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
605707787.jp_real: ふむ…まだ油断はできない
605707787.en_literal: I still can't afford to be careless.
605707787.english: Do not be lulled into a false sense of security.

150063828.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_1
150063828.english: I can always rely on this crew.

521701654.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_2
521701654.jp_real: 見事な動きだったぞ、お前たち。
521701654.en_literal: That was quite a move, you guys.

324155903.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
324155903.jp_real: 全員、いい判断をしたな。

371400499.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1
371400499.jp_real: みんな、いい連携だった
371400499.en_literal: Everyone, that was a good link.

88607624.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
88607624.jp_real: 共に支え合えば、勝てぬ敵などいない。
88607624.en_literal: If we support each other, there is no enemy we cannot defeat.
88607624.english: So long as we support one another, no foe can stop us!

1059186953.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
1059186953.en_literal: Hey, don't let your guard down!

98370873.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
98370873.jp_real: まだまだここからだぞ！お前たち！
98370873.en_literal: We're just getting started! You guys!
98370873.english: The war is not won yet!

221795502.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
221795502.jp_real: 次も皆の力を合わせるとしよう
221795502.en_literal: Let's combine our strength once again.

612857489.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
612857489.english: Yes, it couldn't have gone better.

541900876.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
541900876.jp_real: ふふ。まだまだいけるのだろう？
541900876.en_literal: Heh... I've still got plenty left in me, don't you think?

894772195.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
894772195.jp_real: ふむ。次はもっと鋭く切り込んでみるか。
894772195.en_literal: Hmm. Let's cut deeper next time.
894772195.english: Hm. Do you feel we could improve our synergy?

204925050.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
204925050.jp_real: 次も頼りにさせてもらうぞ
204925050.en_literal: I'll be counting on you again.

656051862.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
656051862.english: Truly, your swordplay is not of these skies.

470670487.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
470670487.jp_real: いい腕だ。日々の鍛錬がうかがえる。
470670487.en_literal: Nice arm. I can tell you train every day.
470670487.english: In your blade, I see reflected a caring heart.

251484604.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
251484604.en_literal: You were reading ahead, weren't you?

4136031.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
4136031.jp_real: ああ、運の呼吸。実に見事だ。
4136031.english: Where there is harmony, there is strength.

944872377.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
944872377.jp_real: 見事だった、ランスロット。

857784498.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0900
857784498.jp_real: 腕を上げたな、ヴェイン。
857784498.english: You've strengthened both body and mind.

424590477.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
424590477.jp_real: いい連携だったな、パーシヴァル。
424590477.english: You've always been a shrewd fighter.

530641929.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
530641929.jp_real: 援護感謝する。シャルロッテ殿。
530641929.en_literal: I'm grateful for your support, Charlotta.
530641929.english: Thank you for your aid, Knight of Lumiel.

747429511.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
747429511.jp_real: ヨダルラーハ、素晴らしい技だ！
747429511.english: Your blade has seen many battles.

132159860.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
132159860.jp_real: うん。恐ろしい立ちすじだ。
132159860.en_literal: Hmph. You've got some terrifying power.
132159860.english: Your blade is as cold and unerring as death.

428787069.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
428787069.jp_real: 伝説の拳、シカと見せてもらった
428787069.en_literal: I've seen the legendary fist in action.
428787069.english: You oft hear legends, but it is rare to see one.

877027774.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
877027774.jp_real: バザラガ、お前もこの大群の闇に怯えてるのか？
877027774.en_literal: The darkness of the Great Wyrm Grouurnos is bottomless?
877027774.english: Grynoth strikes me as a sinister weapon.

599348044.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
599348044.en_literal: That was a splendid display of support.
599348044.english: May alchemy never be used for works of evil.

176997250.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
176997250.jp_real: 頂上の剣に、参考とさせてもらいたいものだ。
176997250.en_literal: I'd like to make the sword of the heavens my third course.
176997250.english: You don't mind if I steal a few of your supernatural sword skills for myself, do you?

902093667.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
902093667.jp_real: うん、惚れ惚れするような剣技だ
902093667.en_literal: Hmm. A swordsmanship that makes you fall in love with it.

343558107.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
343558107.jp_real: 次も援護を頼めるか、ソーン殿。
343558107.en_literal: Can you cover my back again, Tweyen?
343558107.english: Where would I be without your aid, Tweyen?

871976331.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
871976331.english: You could teach me a thing or two.

774902000.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
774902000.jp_real: 追撃に感謝する。マギラフリラ殿。
774902000.en_literal: I'm grateful for the surprise attack. With Maglielle's help.

898232787.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
898232787.jp_real: 足技のみでここまでやるとは、驚嘆に値する
898232787.en_literal: To get this far using only footwork... you truly deserve the title of "Extreme".
898232787.english: Impressive how you fell our foes with naught but your kicks.

708164126.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
708164126.jp_real: うん。血がざわめくようだ。

321283668.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
321283668.jp_real: バオ、接しやすいのはローランド殿のおかげか
321283668.en_literal: I can keep my guard up thanks to you, Roland.

140952354.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
140952354.english: We make a rather good team.

134396183.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
134396183.english: You've a level head on your shoulders.

454323522.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
454323522.english: You're the best marksman I've met.

747685138.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
747685138.en_literal: So you're a master of manipulating thorns, are you?
747685138.english: Nature can be as terrible as she is charming.

481636051.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
481636051.jp_real: フェリ、協力に感謝する
481636051.en_literal: Ferry, thank you for your cooperation.
481636051.english: It is a comforting thing to be part of a pack.

445619121.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
445619121.jp_real: 今のはよくついてこられたな
445619121.english: You've gotten better at reading the flow of battle.

945681571.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
945681571.jp_real: おまえの力には驚かされるな
945681571.english: I've known you for many years, and still, you never cease to surprise me.

944541163.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
944541163.jp_real: おお、随分と成長したな
944541163.en_literal: Huh. You've come a long way.

521137131.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
521137131.jp_real: よし！このまま一気に攻める！
521137131.en_literal: Alright! Let's attack all at once!

756660408.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
756660408.jp_real: ありがとう。いい連携だった
756660408.en_literal: Thanks. That was a good link.
756660408.english: The knight and the samurai, a dashing combination!

697690729.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
697690729.jp_real: 奇伝が敵でないこと、感謝しなくてはな。
697690729.en_literal: I'm grateful that the shrine isn't the enemy.

534973127.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
534973127.jp_real: ふむ、踏み込みが甘かったか。
534973127.en_literal: Hmph. My advance was too soft.

285163234.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
285163234.jp_real: まだまだ余裕がありそうだ
285163234.en_literal: You still have some room to spare.
285163234.english: You haven't even broken a sweat!

677662582.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
677662582.english: You seem to be in a rather good mood.

352510635.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
352510635.jp_real: 俺たちの力で圧倒するぞ
352510635.en_literal: We'll overwhelm them with our power!
352510635.english: None can stand against our combined force!

867079499.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
867079499.jp_real: ホォ。針の穴すらも通す勢いだ。
867079499.en_literal: Hoh... Even a needle's eye couldn't stop this momentum.
867079499.english: Bravo! You threaded the needle on that last shot!

1035721704.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
1035721704.jp_real: ふむ。最強の男を名乗るだけはある。
1035721704.en_literal: Hmph. You may call yourself the strongest, but...
1035721704.english: Huh. No wonder some people call you the strongest man alive.

530990636.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
530990636.jp_real: ふん。剣を飛ばして戦うとはな。
530990636.english: Hmm. Is it magic that causes them to fly?

769375912.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
769375912.jp_real: 一部の隙もない見事な追撃だった
769375912.en_literal: That was a flawless, unbroken chain of attacks.
769375912.english: A knight could not ask for a better counterstroke!

89654827.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
89654827.jp_real: うおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおお
89654827.en_literal: The incomprehensible power of darkness that devours all things?
89654827.english: Your darkness could swallow all light, all creation.

644607202.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_3
644607202.english: There's still work to be done.

124509624.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0100
124509624.jp_real: よし、この勢いのまま進むぞ！
124509624.en_literal: Alright! Let's keep this momentum going!
124509624.english: The winds of fortune are with us!

288598606.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
288598606.jp_real: カタリナ殿、このまま押し切るぞ！
288598606.en_literal: Katalina-dono, I'll push through as is!

889563137.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
889563137.en_literal: That was a great job, Io.
889563137.english: You should be proud of yourself, Io.

848084169.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
848084169.jp_real: 背中を預けられるというのは、いいものだな。
848084169.en_literal: Being able to rely on someone's back... that's a good thing.
848084169.english: I can breathe easily with you at my back.

810283547.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
810283547.jp_real: さあ、次の相手はどいつだ？
810283547.english: Who will be our next opponent?

297817457.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
297817457.english: Are you ready for another hunt?

844846436.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
844846436.jp_real: お前ならもっと高みを目指せるはずだ
844846436.en_literal: You should aim for even greater heights.
844846436.english: You're destined for great things, Lancelot.

596448278.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
596448278.jp_real: ヴェイン！まだいけるだろ？
596448278.en_literal: Vane! You can still make it!
596448278.english: Vane, think you can take more?

735938400.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
735938400.english: I think that went rather well.

182382561.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
182382561.jp_real: ここに合わせるとは、尋常ではないな。
182382561.en_literal: To meet here... this is most irregular.

728686836.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
728686836.en_literal: Don't let your guard down this time either.
728686836.english: Danger yet lurks in the shadows.

914359747.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
914359747.jp_real: 百人力とはまさにこのこと
914359747.en_literal: This is what a hundred-man force truly means.
914359747.english: You are worth a hundred mail-clad knights!

1054455217.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
1054455217.en_literal: Zeta, don't let your guard down!
1054455217.english: Zeta, keep your wits about you.

659666085.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
659666085.jp_real: 完璧な追撃！さすがだな！
659666085.english: That was a fine display, my friend!

169293840.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
169293840.english: You aren't one for mercy, are you?

995875397.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
995875397.jp_real: 心を強く持て。呑まれるなよ。
995875397.en_literal: Keep your heart strong. Don't get swallowed up.
995875397.english: You must master your strength before it masters you.

373911811.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
373911811.jp_real: まだまだいけるな、サンダルフォン。

1039100693.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
1039100693.jp_real: 力を抜くべきところは抜くか…。俺も見習わなければ。
1039100693.en_literal: I should learn when to let go of my strength.
1039100693.english: I see. A swordsman must keep his strength in reserve if he is to prevail.

155272100.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
155272100.en_literal: Alright! Let's link to the next one!

879568533.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
879568533.jp_real: よし。悪くない連携だったな。
879568533.en_literal: Alright. That wasn't a bad link.
879568533.english: That was a superb exhibition of teamwork.

145718508.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
145718508.jp_real: ベアトリクス、けがはないか？

542914840.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
542914840.jp_real: さすがだ、ユーステス殿。

867588199.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
867588199.jp_real: フラウド殿の想いが伝わる一撃だった
867588199.en_literal: It was a one-shot that conveyed Fraux's feelings.
867588199.english: There's a certain passion behind your strikes.

911540944.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
911540944.jp_real: さっきの攻撃、相手が気の毒になるほどだった
911540944.en_literal: Your attack just now... it was enough to make the enemy's heart tremble.
911540944.english: Your brutality makes me pity our foes.

160189549.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
160189549.english: Huh. It's been many years since I slayed that dragon.

5982383.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0100
5982383.jp_real: 何？大したことはしていない
5982383.en_literal: What? I'm not doing anything special.
5982383.english: Only looking out for my captain.

483995465.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
483995465.jp_real: 問題ない。次に備えるぞ。
483995465.en_literal: No problem. Let's prepare for the next one.
483995465.english: Well, I'll give you a chance to humble me during the next round.

700374070.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
700374070.jp_real: ふん、甲い被りすぎだぞ、ラカム。
700374070.en_literal: You're getting too wrapped up in your armor, Rackam.
700374070.english: Do you mean that in a positive sense?

463121404.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
463121404.jp_real: 何？当然のことをしたまでだ。
463121404.en_literal: What? I only did what was obvious.
463121404.english: I was simply performing my duty.

1008495667.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
1008495667.jp_real: これくらい、どうということはない。
1008495667.en_literal: I can't see any problem with this.
1008495667.english: And I'd say you're amazed easily.

48506899.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
48506899.jp_real: 光栄です、薔薇の女王様。
48506899.english: I am your humble servant, Queen of Roses.

1000528085.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
1000528085.jp_real: フェリとペットたちのおかげだな
1000528085.en_literal: It's thanks to you, Ferry, and the pets.
1000528085.english: You must ask your pack to take a bow as well.

208617172.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
208617172.jp_real: さあ、次は俺に合わせてみろ。
208617172.english: I'd say you'll be keeping me company very soon.

902748298.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
902748298.jp_real: 油断は禁物だ、ヴェイン！
902748298.en_literal: I'm not letting my guard down, Vane!
902748298.english: Now, Vane, let us save the rejoicing for later.

501760261.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
501760261.jp_real: その言葉、そのまま返すぞ！
501760261.en_literal: I'll return those words to you!

599727137.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
599727137.jp_real: 今のはシャルロッテ殿の気配りあってこその連携だったぞ。
599727137.en_literal: That was only possible thanks to your kindness, Charlotte.
599727137.english: I'd say our swords are about the same size, wouldn't you?

503854569.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
503854569.jp_real: 機嫌の変幻自在の剣こそ、無類の技だとお見受けするが。
503854569.en_literal: I see your sword, Yodarha, as a weapon of the ancient dragon's power, but I suspect it's merely a crude imitation.
503854569.english: And you've mastered so many forms. You're a pack unto yourself.

109999621.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
109999621.english: There's no need to thank me.

673757302.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
673757302.jp_real: ガンダゴウザ殿こそ、実に痛快だった。
673757302.en_literal: Ghandagoza, you were truly a worthy opponent.

221535548.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
221535548.jp_real: あまり熱くなりすぎないようにな
221535548.english: Let's not singe our armor in the process next time, hm?

899622490.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
899622490.english: And here I thought to say the same to you.

343637478.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
343637478.jp_real: 俺で実験をというのは勘弁願いたいが
343637478.en_literal: I'd prefer you not use me as a test subject.
343637478.english: I do hope you're not planning to experiment on me.

927114408.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
927114408.jp_real: ああ、俺たちの剣で切り開こう
927114408.en_literal: Let's cut through this with our blades.

205871711.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
205871711.jp_real: なあに？気にするな、サンダルフォン。
205871711.en_literal: What? Don't worry about it, Sandalphon.

710698282.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
710698282.jp_real: ソーン殿の弓矢の速さには敵わないがな。
710698282.en_literal: I can't match the speed of your bow, Thorn.
710698282.english: The sheer speed of your arrows leaves my own skill wanting.

944614322.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
944614322.jp_real: 楽しいかはさておき、この勢いを維持するぞ。
944614322.en_literal: Let's set aside the fun for now. I'll keep this momentum going.
944614322.english: Putting aside your questionable enjoyment, I appreciate the vigor.

42649498.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
42649498.jp_real: 過言はできない立ちでな
42649498.en_literal: I can't afford to be soft.
42649498.english: Well, I do try, my lady.

531236599.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
531236599.jp_real: いい気迫だ、ベアトリクス。

98105099.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
98105099.jp_real: ああ、合わせてみせよう
98105099.en_literal: Ah, let's show them what we've got!

617894669.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
617894669.jp_real: おっと、バレてしまったか

163576098.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
163576098.jp_real: ああ、こればっかりは慣れないな
163576098.en_literal: Ah... I just can't get used to this.
163576098.english: It is. And I fear it shall never get easier.

494306665.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
494306665.jp_real: よし！このまま押し切るぞ！
494306665.en_literal: Alright! Let's push through like this!
494306665.english: I would fight alongside you a thousand times over.

1011899980.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
1011899980.jp_real: ふふっ。機嫌もそろそろ本気を出してはどうだ？
1011899980.en_literal: Heh. The legend's about to get serious.
1011899980.english: I'd be interested in seeing more of your blade work when you aren't holding back.

453343801.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
453343801.english: Well then, what's our next act?

96840104.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
96840104.jp_real: 敵に攻撃の機会を与えないようにするのがコツだな。
96840104.en_literal: The key is not giving the enemy an opening to attack.
96840104.english: The key is to give your opponents no quarter.

178563646.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
178563646.jp_real: どんな敵にも遅れは取らないが、決して慢心はしない。
178563646.en_literal: I don't lag behind any foe, but I'll never become complacent.
178563646.english: Not that I disagree, but take care not to underestimate your opponent.

548158645.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
548158645.en_literal: Heh heh... Did I surprise you?

162589255.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
162589255.jp_real: うん。熊殺しという異名もあったな。そういえば。
162589255.en_literal: Hmph. I suppose I did have the alias "Bear Slayer," come to think of it.
162589255.english: Yes, but that was back in the day.

506796764.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
506796764.jp_real: そうだな。だからこそ、気を引き締めねばなるまい。
506796764.en_literal: That's right. That's why we must stay alert.
506796764.english: It's a strange feeling to be called lovely by a rose.

885062566.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
885062566.jp_real: ……だてに視線は越えていないからな。
885062566.english: Well, I spend half my days on the battlefield.

200556768.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
200556768.jp_real: おっと、オクセズ切り込んでけ！
200556768.en_literal: Heh! I'll cut through without hesitation!
200556768.english: You have my support now and forevermore.

740837213.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
740837213.jp_real: そうだな、今のはなかなかだったぞ。
740837213.en_literal: That was quite something, wasn't it?

781650180.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
781650180.jp_real: 多少荒削りなところはあるがな。
781650180.en_literal: Heh heh. There's a bit of roughness to it, I suppose.
781650180.english: I am only a knight, like yourself.

564210850.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
564210850.jp_real: ああ、この剣は大切なものを守るために振るうものだからな。
564210850.en_literal: This sword... I wield it to protect what's precious.
564210850.english: It's because I fight for a good cause.

682791226.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
682791226.jp_real: 期待に沿えるよう尽力する
682791226.en_literal: I'll do my best to live up to your expectations.
682791226.english: That's quite a lot to live up to.

704194347.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
704194347.jp_real: 奇伝の拳あってこそだったな
704194347.en_literal: It was only thanks to our clash of fists that we could reach this point.

798481322.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
798481322.jp_real: すべて合わせて見せようじゃないか
798481322.en_literal: Let's show them everything we've got!
798481322.english: No, it was our combination which led to victory.

216893233.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
216893233.jp_real: ふん。まだまだ鈍るような腕ではないぞ。
216893233.en_literal: Hmph. I'm not some weakling yet.
216893233.english: And a few centuries has taught you much.

1055321484.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
1055321484.jp_real: イドが背負う地と宿命。先達である俺が支えねばなるまい。
1055321484.en_literal: The burden Id carries is heavy. As his comrade, I must support him.
1055321484.english: You do not bear this burden alone.

752161344.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
752161344.jp_real: うーん。少々張り切りすぎてしまったか。
752161344.en_literal: Hmm... did I get a bit too fired up?

387395371.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
387395371.jp_real: ああ、だからこそ剣の道は奥深いんだろ
387395371.en_literal: That's why the path of the sword is so profound, right?
387395371.english: Agreed. Every swordsman walks his own path.

138393122.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
138393122.jp_real: ふっ…俺にはもったいない言葉だ
138393122.en_literal: That's a waste of words on me.
138393122.english: You waste such golden words on the likes of me.

591329110.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
591329110.jp_real: 参考にでもなったのならいいが
591329110.en_literal: If it was of any use to you, then that's fine.
591329110.english: I think you've got the wrong idea.

960401703.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
960401703.jp_real: いいや、十分だったと思うぞ。
960401703.en_literal: Nah, I think that was more than enough.
960401703.english: You did fine. Don't sell yourself short.

847991093.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
847991093.jp_real: 期待に応えられたのなら、幸いだ。
847991093.en_literal: If you were able to meet my expectations, that's a relief.
847991093.english: I'm merely glad to have lived up to your expectations.

87872992.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
87872992.jp_real: この剣こそが俺の違いだ。という答えではダメか？
87872992.en_literal: This sword is my true self. Isn't that answer enough?

983138794.label: PL1102_vo_SP_charge_speak_3
983138794.jp_real: 血をかける黒龍の矢がよ！
983138794.en_literal: A black dragon's arrow that pierces the blood!

974517279.label: PL1102_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_1
974517279.english: With this blade, I shall teach them fear!

15193774.label: PL1102_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_2
15193774.english: Well done! We have them cornered!

906919739.label: PL1102_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_3
906919739.jp_real: みんなの想い、無駄にはせん！
906919739.en_literal: Everyone's will... won't go to waste!
906919739.english: I will not falter! Not with lives on the line!

785441455.label: PL1102_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL0700
785441455.en_literal: I won't let you get away!

591198498.label: PL1102_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL2400
591198498.en_literal: I won't let you get away with this!

963818684.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
963818684.jp_real: 風を纏いし聖将軍。どれほどの相手か。
963818684.en_literal: A wind-wracked, one-eyed young warrior. How many opponents are there?
963818684.english: Now how will you respond, primal of howling wind?

895313722.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
895313722.jp_real: 力比べなら負けんぞ、将軍！
895313722.en_literal: I won't lose to you in a strength contest, General!
895313722.english: You can't best us in a contest of strength, General!

458880401.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
458880401.jp_real: なるほどな。この男、相当な手練れだ。
458880401.en_literal: I see. This man is quite the handful.
458880401.english: Hmph. He's as skillful as he is boisterous.

1033790048.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
1033790048.jp_real: やつを勢いにのまれるな！
1033790048.en_literal: I can't be overwhelmed by his momentum!
1033790048.english: Do what you must to avoid his reach!

13299151.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
13299151.jp_real: なるほど。確かにやるようだな。
13299151.en_literal: I see. You really are going to do it.
13299151.english: No wonder this man is a commander.

196202729.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_1_FIRST
196202729.en_literal: Even in the daytime, we fight.
196202729.english: He's still standing after that attack?

56684358.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
56684358.jp_real: 何の生焼けであろうとも、ここで打ち倒す！
56684358.en_literal: No matter what holy spear you wield, I'll shatter it here!

959403760.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
959403760.jp_real: テリトリを荒らしてしまったか。悪かったな。
959403760.en_literal: I've messed up your territory. Sorry about that.
959403760.english: Is this your territory? Our mistake.

60989935.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
60989935.jp_real: こいつらの射線に入らぬよう、立ち回らねばな。
60989935.en_literal: I'll have to move around to avoid getting hit by their line of fire.
60989935.english: Be lithe on your feet and keep the enemy guessing!

324819008.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
324819008.en_literal: How far can I protect you?
324819008.english: How long can you maintain your defenses?

128986282.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
128986282.jp_real: ケンは直接振るってこそとは思うんか
128986282.en_literal: You think a sword is only worth swinging directly?
128986282.english: Have you tried holding your sword?

64304795.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
64304795.jp_real: 攻撃が通じているようだな
64304795.en_literal: It seems my attack is getting through.
64304795.english: Our attacks appear to be landing.

157530454.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
157530454.jp_real: 面白い術を使うものだな。だが
157530454.en_literal: You've got some interesting tricks there. But...
157530454.english: That's quite the fighting style you have. But will it be enough?

247851568.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
247851568.jp_real: 絶対無敵というわけでもあるまい
247851568.english: Even the mightiest fortress has its cracks.

731822321.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
731822321.en_literal: One step at a time. I'll definitely win.
731822321.english: Each small step brings us closer to giant victory!

372602669.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
372602669.jp_real: 足しか届かないのなら、足から叩くぞ！
372602669.en_literal: If you can't reach me with your fists, I'll hit you with my feet!
372602669.english: Come on everyone! Let's break a leg!

971651483.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
971651483.jp_real: 勝利は目前だが、気を抜くなよ
971651483.en_literal: Victory is near, but don't let your guard down.
971651483.english: Don't collapse right before the finish line!

273701138.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_B
273701138.jp_real: ままだ！もういっしょいくぞ！
273701138.english: Hold the celebrations! We must make another push!

998210411.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
998210411.jp_real: ようやくここまで来たな。あと少しだ。
998210411.en_literal: I've finally made it this far. Just a little more.
998210411.english: What a nice view. I can see our victory from up here.

198334307.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
198334307.jp_real: こんなもので足止めできると思わないことだ
198334307.en_literal: I don't think something like this can stop me.
198334307.english: It'll take more than this to stop us! Much more!

298562259.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
298562259.jp_real: 意思なき攻撃など通用しない
298562259.english: When one has no reason to fight, they've already lost.

544806800.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
544806800.en_literal: Concentrated attack on the hundredth part!

1063305825.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
1063305825.jp_real: 大層な兵器だが、破壊する！
1063305825.en_literal: Such a magnificent weapon... I'll destroy it!
1063305825.english: Should've left your toys at home if you didn't want them broken!

643952561.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
643952561.jp_real: 悪いが、ここで止まるわけにはいかんのでな。
643952561.en_literal: I'm sorry, but I can't stop here.
643952561.english: You're gravely mistaken if you think you can stop us!

847597254.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
847597254.jp_real: 率直に言う。連携の練度が足りんのではないか、将軍。
847597254.en_literal: Frankly, wouldn't the coordination be lacking, General?
847597254.english: My advice to you, generals, work on your coordination.

512505210.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
512505210.jp_real: なぜそこまでしてリリスに仕える
512505210.en_literal: Why go to such lengths to serve Lilith?
512505210.english: Why do you still insist on serving Lilith?

559006793.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
559006793.jp_real: 互いの強弱をかけた戦いか
559006793.english: We've been thrust into a clash with titans!

758499066.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
758499066.jp_real: よし、ピックアップしているぞ

624173942.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
624173942.jp_real: いい流れだ。今度こそは。
624173942.en_literal: Good flow. This time for sure...
624173942.english: The tide of battle flows in our favor!

551950660.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
551950660.jp_real: イドを倒せねば、先は進めんか
551950660.en_literal: If I can't defeat Id, can I even move forward?
551950660.english: Must defeat it to press on!

889937758.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
889937758.jp_real: ニューゴロシの本領発揮といくか？
889937758.en_literal: I'll activate the full power of New World Slayer.
889937758.english: I'll show you why they call me Dragon Slayer!

823858458.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
823858458.jp_real: まったく、お互い業が深い
823858458.english: In truth, we're more alike than you know.

81908250.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
81908250.jp_real: 蹴りをつけようじゃないか
81908250.en_literal: Let's put the finishing touches on this.
81908250.english: It all comes down to this!

79882353.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
79882353.jp_real: その力…お前は何を背負っている
79882353.en_literal: That power... What are you carrying?
79882353.english: Have you always shouldered this power... this burden?

662493059.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
662493059.jp_real: 以前の戦いを思い出せ！動きに対応できるはずだ！
662493059.en_literal: Remember the battles of the past. I should be able to respond to his movements.
662493059.english: Remember the strategies we've learned along the way!

11574820.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
11574820.jp_real: 手を抜ける相手ではないようだ
11574820.en_literal: He's not someone you can slip past.
11574820.english: Can't afford to take this one lightly!

308770517.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
308770517.jp_real: わずかな隙を見逃すな！
308770517.english: If you see an opening, take it!

44046986.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
44046986.jp_real: 相手にとって不足はない
44046986.english: We need only triumph once more!

457570038.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
457570038.en_literal: I'm not going to let you get away with this!

53822190.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
53822190.en_literal: Let me put you to sleep.

284761246.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
284761246.jp_real: 立ち塞がるのならば、斬るのみ！
284761246.en_literal: If you stand in my way... I'll cut you down!
284761246.english: That was your final warning! Now answer to my blade!

981745582.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
981745582.jp_real: 以前と同じ要領で食らいつくんだ！
981745582.en_literal: I'll crush you with the same power as before!
981745582.english: We've slain it once! We can slay it again!

423499047.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
423499047.en_literal: Heh. You've gotten used to it.

67722452.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
67722452.en_literal: Alright! That was quite the fight!

16533815.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
16533815.jp_real: ガランツァ将軍に続くぞ！

815091745.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
815091745.jp_real: 足場には気をつけてくれよ
815091745.english: Be careful where you step, everyone!

727093625.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
727093625.jp_real: ここを突破し、リリスの元へ急がねばな。
727093625.en_literal: I'll break through here and rush to Lilith's side!
727093625.english: Once we put out this fire, all that's left is Lilith!

322108122.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
322108122.jp_real: 何度立ち上がろうとも同じことだ
322108122.en_literal: No matter how many times I'm stripped bare, it's the same thing.
322108122.english: Mountains and deserts couldn't stop us. What chance do you have?

145172474.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
145172474.jp_real: 我が翼に、この空のために振るわん！
145172474.en_literal: For my sword, and for this sky!
145172474.english: I wield my sword for the sake of the skies!

87149361.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
87149361.jp_real: リリスのスキルは刺せん！
87149361.en_literal: I won't let you use that skill!
87149361.english: Your reign of terror is over, Lilith!

934289071.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
934289071.jp_real: 行く！攻撃の手を休めるな！
934289071.en_literal: I can do it! I can rest my hand from attacking!

538656799.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
538656799.jp_real: アンラマニュ！今度こそ鎮めさせてもらおう！
538656799.en_literal: I'll let you have it this time.
538656799.english: Your end is come, Angra Mainyu!

196255769.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
196255769.jp_real: お前ら、見せ場は俺のものだ！
196255769.en_literal: I won't let you get away! Iris!

123945454.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
123945454.jp_real: 俺たちの全てをこの戦いにぶつけるんだ！
123945454.en_literal: I'll throw everything we've got into this fight!
123945454.english: We've come so far. This is it, everyone!

586260095.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
586260095.jp_real: 救済を謳い、異形となり果てるなど、小し！
586260095.en_literal: I'll sing the song of the dragon, and become a bird of prey. Show me!
586260095.english: Don't make me laugh. No one believes in your twisted vision of salvation!

308405781.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
308405781.jp_real: 絆の力。心地よいものだな。
308405781.en_literal: The power of bonds... it's a pleasant feeling.
308405781.english: From the links we've forged, flows boundless strength!

380392969.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
380392969.jp_real: イド！聞こえているんだろ！
380392969.en_literal: Ido! You can hear me, right?
380392969.english: Id! I know you can hear us!

764401328.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
764401328.en_literal: The power of the gods... is reacting!
764401328.english: What is my dragon blood reacting to?

773458381.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
773458381.jp_real: 一部のスキも見逃すな！
773458381.en_literal: Don't overlook even a single opening!

388920442.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
388920442.jp_real: 竜殺しの剣を、かの破壊の龍に向けることになるとはな。
388920442.en_literal: To think I'd point the Dragon Slayer's sword toward the Dragon of Ruin...
388920442.english: Dragon Slayer versus Dragon of Destruction. I didn't see that coming.

904676165.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
904676165.jp_real: 北流の輪ぎとで神くらかん！
904676165.en_literal: With the breath of the Frost Dragon, I'll crush you!
904676165.english: Feel the fang of the black dragons!

793809528.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
793809528.jp_real: 引き続き仕掛ける！お前たちは警戒を！
793809528.en_literal: I'll keep pressing the attack. You all stay alert.
793809528.english: Stay on your guard! This battle isn't over yet!

680775811.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_1_FIRST
680775811.english: This man is the real deal!

443510860.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
443510860.en_literal: I'll go all the way to the back.
443510860.english: We shouldn't linger on trivial fights.

430545362.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
430545362.jp_real: 今のような連携を維持しよう
430545362.en_literal: Let's keep up this kind of teamwork.
430545362.english: They'll crumble under our united assault!

337174561.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
337174561.en_literal: Should I move out of the way?

98235980.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
98235980.jp_real: 何センカ！俺から離れるな！
98235980.en_literal: Nonsense! You're not getting away from me!
98235980.english: This is chaotic! Stay close to me!

139279680.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
139279680.jp_real: 視界が悪い！周囲に警戒を！
139279680.en_literal: I'll take care of this. Let's go!
139279680.english: Poor visibility can lead to death. Watch your flanks.

290474506.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
290474506.jp_real: 彼女に魔物を近づけなければいいのだろう
290474506.en_literal: I just have to keep the monsters away from her.
290474506.english: Protect the Overseer! I can handle that!

899287843.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
899287843.jp_real: ルリアを救うため、前へ進もう！
899287843.en_literal: I must move forward to save Lyria.

512123511.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
512123511.jp_real: 見事な連携だ、お前たち。

226518169.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
226518169.jp_real: 大した相手ではないはずだ
226518169.en_literal: He shouldn't be much of a challenge.
226518169.english: They weren't much to speak of.

39596302.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
39596302.jp_real: 俺たちの相手ではない
39596302.english: We can't waste our time on you lot!

91394998.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
91394998.jp_real: 道をあけてもらおうか

543300794.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
543300794.jp_real: 激しい抵抗が来る！気を引き締めていくぞ！
543300794.en_literal: A fierce resistance is coming! I'll tighten the screws!
543300794.english: Their forces are strong. Expect fierce resistance.

596827384.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
596827384.jp_real: 相手が何であろうと、退けるのみだ。
596827384.en_literal: No matter what the opponent is, I'll just clear them out.
596827384.english: Leave only the dead in our wake!

20311352.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
20311352.jp_real: 今こそ騎士の矜持を忘れないようにしないとな
20311352.en_literal: Now's the time to remember the knight's pride.
20311352.english: Dig deep! Now more than ever!

297731862.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
297731862.jp_real: おとなしく登らせてくれはしないだろうな
297731862.en_literal: I won't let you climb up so easily.
297731862.english: So much for an uneventful hike to the top.

472036559.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
472036559.jp_real: 俺たちの理解の及ばない場所のようだな
472036559.en_literal: It's like a place beyond our comprehension.
472036559.english: Have we wandered into a waking nightmare?

362809723.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
362809723.en_literal: I can't afford to be careless yet.
362809723.english: Do not be lulled into a false sense of security.

173996222.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_1
173996222.english: I can always rely on this crew.

928895912.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_2
928895912.jp_real: 見事な動きだったぞ、お前たち。

744823387.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
744823387.jp_real: 全員、いい判断をしたな。

471341427.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1
471341427.jp_real: みんな、いい連携だった

690778025.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
690778025.jp_real: 共に支え合えば、勝てぬ敵などいない。
690778025.en_literal: Together, we can overcome anything. There's no enemy we can't defeat.
690778025.english: So long as we support one another, no foe can stop us!

835426684.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
835426684.en_literal: Hey, don't let your guard down!

20919873.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
20919873.jp_real: まだまだここからだぞ！お前たち！
20919873.en_literal: We're just getting started, you know!
20919873.english: The war is not won yet!

699605999.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
699605999.jp_real: 次も皆の力を合わせるとしよう
699605999.en_literal: Let's combine our powers once again.

331040754.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
331040754.english: Yes, it couldn't have gone better.

505241171.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
505241171.jp_real: ふふ。まだまだいけるのだろ？
505241171.en_literal: Heh. I'm sure I can still go on.

141049083.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
141049083.jp_real: ふむ。次はもっと鋭く斬り込んでみるか。
141049083.en_literal: Hmm. Let's cut deeper next time.
141049083.english: Do you feel we could improve our synergy?

349597954.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
349597954.jp_real: 次も頼りにさせてもらうぞ

421289423.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
421289423.english: Truly, your swordplay is not of these skies.

551781884.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
551781884.jp_real: いい腕だ。日々の鍛錬がうかがえる。
551781884.en_literal: Nice arm. I can see your daily training.
551781884.english: In your blade, I see reflected a caring heart.

508743214.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
508743214.en_literal: I'll lead the way this time too!

276612204.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
276612204.en_literal: You were reading ahead, weren't you?

1050156087.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
1050156087.jp_real: ああ、運の呼吸。実に見事だ。
1050156087.english: Where there is harmony, there is strength.

792735231.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
792735231.jp_real: 見事だった、ランスロット。
792735231.en_literal: That was a good one, Lancelot.

760010142.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0900
760010142.jp_real: 腕を上げたら、ヴェイン。
760010142.english: You've strengthened both body and mind.

982124886.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
982124886.jp_real: いい連携だったな、パーシヴァル。
982124886.english: You've always been a shrewd fighter.

619937462.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
619937462.jp_real: 援護感謝する。シャルロッテ殿。
619937462.en_literal: I'm grateful for your support, Charlotta.
619937462.english: Thank you for your aid, Knight of Lumiel.

566699895.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
566699895.jp_real: ヨダルラーハ、素晴らしい技だ
566699895.english: Your blade has seen many battles.

5290166.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
5290166.jp_real: うん、恐ろしい立ちすじだ
5290166.english: Your blade is as cold and unerring as death.

584319210.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
584319210.jp_real: 伝説の拳、しかと見せてもらった
584319210.en_literal: I've seen the legendary fist in action.
584319210.english: You oft hear legends, but it is rare to see one.

527577015.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
527577015.en_literal: I'll take that as a challenge. I accept.

576820058.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
576820058.jp_real: バザラガ、お前もグローヌスの闇を知っているのか？
576820058.en_literal: So that's the darkness of the Great Grounos?
576820058.english: Grynoth strikes me as a sinister weapon.

1008758475.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
1008758475.en_literal: That was a splendid display of support.
1008758475.english: May alchemy never be used for works of evil.

690923423.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
690923423.jp_real: ジークフリート。調教の権威、参考とさせてもらいたいものだ。
690923423.en_literal: I'd like to borrow your sword at the peak.
690923423.english: You don't mind if I steal a few of your supernatural sword skills for myself, do you?

786121358.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
786121358.jp_real: うん、惚れ惚れするような剣技だ
786121358.en_literal: Hm. A swordplay that'll make you fall head over heels.

136281480.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
136281480.jp_real: 次も援護を頼めるか、ソーン殿。
136281480.en_literal: Can you cover my back again, Tweyen?
136281480.english: Where would I be without your aid, Tweyen?

484989716.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
484989716.english: You could teach me a thing or two.

937521034.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
937521034.jp_real: 戦撃に感謝する。紛らかにしたの。

940643839.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
940643839.jp_real: 足技のみでここまでやるとは、驚嘆に値する
940643839.en_literal: To get this far with just footwork is truly astonishing.
940643839.english: Impressive how you fell our foes with naught but your kicks.

661554509.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
661554509.en_literal: Hmph. Looks like we're in for a rough one.

710408893.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
710408893.jp_real: バオを制しやすいのは、ローランド殿のおかげか。
710408893.en_literal: Is it because of you, Roland?

987514055.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
987514055.english: We make a rather good team.

799759699.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
799759699.english: You've a level head on your shoulders.

550348834.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
550348834.english: You're the best marksman I've met.

400554282.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
400554282.en_literal: So you're a master of manipulating thorns, are you?
400554282.english: Nature can be as terrible as she is charming.

39298028.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
39298028.jp_real: フェリ、協力に感謝する
39298028.en_literal: Ferry, thank you for your cooperation.
39298028.english: It is a comforting thing to be part of a pack.

828031266.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
828031266.jp_real: 今のはよくついてこられたな
828031266.english: You've gotten better at reading the flow of battle.

738050163.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
738050163.jp_real: お前の力には驚かされるな
738050163.english: I've known you for many years, and still, you never cease to surprise me.

84173777.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
84173777.jp_real: おお、随分と成長したな。
84173777.en_literal: Huh? You've grown quite a bit.

238691152.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
238691152.jp_real: よし！このまま一気に攻める！
238691152.en_literal: Alright, let's press on and attack at once!

1016257619.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
1016257619.jp_real: ありがとう。いい連携だった。
1016257619.en_literal: Thanks. That was a good link.
1016257619.english: The knight and the samurai, a dashing combination!

784987645.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
784987645.jp_real: ギデンが敵でないことを感謝しなくてはな
784987645.en_literal: I must thank you for not being able to use your sacred sword.

849668311.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
849668311.jp_real: ふむ…踏み込みが甘かったか
849668311.en_literal: Hmph. My advance was too soft.

636109513.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
636109513.jp_real: まだまだ余裕がありそうだ
636109513.en_literal: You still seem to have some room to spare.
636109513.english: You haven't even broken a sweat!

1018055643.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
1018055643.english: You seem to be in a rather good mood.

358479369.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
358479369.jp_real: 俺たちの力で圧倒するぞ！
358479369.en_literal: We'll overwhelm them with our power!
358479369.english: None can stand against our combined force!

863250409.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
863250409.jp_real: よし、フィーラ、教えてだろ

1059578274.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
1059578274.jp_real: ホウ、針の穴すらも通す勢いだ
1059578274.en_literal: Hoh. Even a needle's eye couldn't stop this momentum.
1059578274.english: Bravo! You threaded the needle on that last shot!

826716951.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
826716951.jp_real: ふむ。最強の男を名乗るだけはある。
826716951.en_literal: Hmph. You may call yourself the strongest, but...
826716951.english: Huh. No wonder some people call you the strongest man alive.

264711495.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
264711495.jp_real: ふむ。剣を飛ばして戦うとはな。
264711495.en_literal: Hmph. Fighting by throwing swords, huh?
264711495.english: Hmm. Is it magic that causes them to fly?

855920902.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
855920902.jp_real: 一部の隙もない見事な追撃だった
855920902.en_literal: That was a flawless, unbroken assault.
855920902.english: A knight could not ask for a better counterstroke!

338873632.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
338873632.jp_real: フェディエル、無想を飲み込む無名の闇の力か。
338873632.en_literal: The incomparable power of the abyss that devours all things?
338873632.english: Your darkness could swallow all light, all creation.

246443603.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_3
246443603.english: There's still work to be done.

265044005.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0100
265044005.jp_real: よし！この勢いのまま進むぞ！
265044005.en_literal: Alright! Let's keep this momentum going!
265044005.english: The winds of fortune are with us!

165109646.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
165109646.jp_real: カタリナ、このまま押し切るぞ！
165109646.en_literal: I'll hold this firm and push through!

138038447.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
138038447.en_literal: That was a great job, Io!
138038447.english: You should be proud of yourself, Io.

363101823.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
363101823.jp_real: オイゲン、背中を預けられるというのは、いいものだな。
363101823.en_literal: Being able to rely on someone's back... that's a good thing.
363101823.english: I can breathe easily with you at my back.

596357175.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
596357175.jp_real: さあ、次の相手はどいつだ？
596357175.english: Who will be our next opponent?

344762799.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
344762799.english: Are you ready for another hunt?

613939115.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
613939115.jp_real: お前ならもっと高みを目指せるはずだ
613939115.en_literal: You should be able to aim for even greater heights.
613939115.english: You're destined for great things, Lancelot.

264141966.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
264141966.jp_real: ウェイン！まだいけるだろ？
264141966.en_literal: Vane! You can still make it!
264141966.english: Vane, think you can take more?

396064064.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
396064064.english: I think that went rather well.

92176654.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
92176654.jp_real: ここに合わせるとは、尋常ではないな。
92176654.en_literal: To meet here... this is most irregular.

1051438776.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
1051438776.en_literal: Don't let your guard down next time either.
1051438776.english: Danger yet lurks in the shadows.

1072438574.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
1072438574.jp_real: 百人敵とはまさにこのこと
1072438574.en_literal: A hundred men? That's exactly what I'm talking about.
1072438574.english: You are worth a hundred mail-clad knights.

208933247.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
208933247.en_literal: Zeta, don't let your guard down!
208933247.english: Zeta, keep your wits about you.

927791596.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
927791596.jp_real: 完璧な追撃！さすがだな！
927791596.english: That was a fine display, my friend!

95235617.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
95235617.english: You aren't one for mercy, are you?

844036217.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
844036217.jp_real: 心を強く持て。呪われるなよ。
844036217.en_literal: Hold your heart strong. Don't get swallowed.
844036217.english: You must master your strength before it masters you.

808330712.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
808330712.jp_real: まだまだいけるな、サンダルフォン。

914029852.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
914029852.en_literal: There are times when you must let go of your strength. I suppose I should learn from that too.
914029852.english: I see. A swordsman must keep his strength in reserve if he is to prevail.

693423041.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
693423041.jp_real: よし。悪くない連携だったな。
693423041.en_literal: Alright. That wasn't a bad link.
693423041.english: That was a superb exhibition of teamwork!

273346987.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
273346987.jp_real: ベアトリクス、怪我はないか？

111249683.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
111249683.jp_real: さすがだ、ユーステス殿。

1061664939.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
1061664939.jp_real: フラウド殿の思いが伝わる一撃だった
1061664939.en_literal: That was a powerful strike, full of Fraux's will.
1061664939.english: There's a certain passion behind your strikes.

997647333.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
997647333.jp_real: さっきの攻撃、相手が気の毒になるほどだった。
997647333.en_literal: That last attack was enough to make the enemy's eyes pop out.
997647333.english: Your brutality makes me pity our foes.

215681481.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
215681481.en_literal: What? You mean the old story?
215681481.english: It's been many years since I slayed that dragon.

275907207.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0100
275907207.jp_real: 何？大したことはしていない
275907207.en_literal: What? I'm not doing anything special.
275907207.english: Only looking out for my captain.

17028138.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
17028138.jp_real: 問題ない。次に備えるぞ。
17028138.en_literal: No problem. Let's prepare for the next one.
17028138.english: Well, I'll give you a chance to humble me during the next round.

938340969.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
938340969.jp_real: ふふ、甲い被りすぎだぞ、ラカム。
938340969.en_literal: You're getting too wrapped up in this, Rackam.
938340969.english: Do you mean that in a positive sense?

671735506.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
671735506.jp_real: 何？当然のことをしたまでだ
671735506.en_literal: What? I only did what was obvious.
671735506.english: I was simply performing my duty.

176849612.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
176849612.jp_real: これくらい、どうということはない
176849612.en_literal: I can't say anything more than this.
176849612.english: And I'd say you're amazed easily.

822974585.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
822974585.jp_real: 光栄です、薔薇の女王様。
822974585.english: I am your humble servant, Queen of Roses.

870518108.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
870518108.jp_real: フェリとペットたちのおかげだな
870518108.en_literal: Thanks to you and the pets.
870518108.english: You must ask your pack to take a bow as well.

425548190.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
425548190.jp_real: さあ、次は俺に合わせてみろ
425548190.en_literal: Alright, now try to keep up with me.
425548190.english: I'd say you'll be keeping me company very soon.

959250736.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
959250736.jp_real: 油断は禁物だ、ヴェイン！
959250736.english: Now, Vane, let us save the rejoicing for later.

686395436.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
686395436.jp_real: その言葉、そのまま返すぞ！
686395436.en_literal: I'll return those words to you!

270208223.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
270208223.jp_real: 今のはシャルロッテ殿の気配りあってこその連携だったぞ
270208223.en_literal: That was only possible thanks to your kindness, Charlotta.
270208223.english: I'd say our swords are about the same size, wouldn't you?

137237776.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
137237776.jp_real: ヨダルラーハ、貴殿の変幻自在の剣こそ、無類の技だとお見受けするが。
137237776.en_literal: The sword of the ancient dragon's divine manifestation... I see it as a technique of the mundane.
137237776.english: And you've mastered so many forms. You're a pack unto yourself.

233905183.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
233905183.en_literal: What? It doesn't even reach zero.
233905183.english: There's no need to thank me.

628810753.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
628810753.jp_real: ガンダゴウザ殿こそ、実に痛快だった
628810753.en_literal: Ghandagoza, you were quite the nuisance.

1071771666.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
1071771666.jp_real: あまり熱くなりすぎないよにな
1071771666.english: Let's not singe our armor in the process next time, hm?

906701547.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
906701547.english: And here I thought to say the same to you.

908643185.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
908643185.jp_real: 俺で実験を…というのは勘弁願いたいが。
908643185.en_literal: I'd prefer you skip the "experiment with me" thing.
908643185.english: I do hope you're not planning to experiment on me.

536503157.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
536503157.jp_real: ああ、俺たちの剣で切り開こう
536503157.en_literal: Let's cut through with our swords.

1005015253.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
1005015253.jp_real: なあに？気にするな、サンダルフォン。
1005015253.en_literal: What? Don't worry about it, Sandalphon.

880981629.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
880981629.jp_real: ソーン殿の弓矢の速さには敵わないがな。
880981629.en_literal: I can't match the speed of the bowman's arrows.
880981629.english: The sheer speed of your arrows leaves my own skill wanting.

867393221.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
867393221.jp_real: 楽しいかはさておき、この勢いを維持するぞ。
867393221.en_literal: Whether it's fun or not, I'll keep this momentum going!
867393221.english: Putting aside your questionable enjoyment, I appreciate the vigor.

22817126.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
22817126.jp_real: 過言はできない立場でな
22817126.english: Well, I do try, my lady.

86868288.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
86868288.jp_real: いい気配だ、ベアトリクス。

548059811.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
548059811.jp_real: ああ、合わせて見せよう
548059811.en_literal: Hah! Let's show them what we've got!

277845123.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
277845123.jp_real: おっと、バレてしまったか。

281242764.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
281242764.jp_real: ああ、こればっかりは慣れないな。
281242764.en_literal: Huh... I can't get used to this.
281242764.english: It is... and I fear it shall never get easier.

587749200.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
587749200.jp_real: よし！このまま押し切るぞ！
587749200.en_literal: Alright! Let's push forward like this!
587749200.english: I would fight alongside you a thousand times over.

1054795278.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
1054795278.jp_real: ふふっ。機嫌もそろそろ本気を出してはどうだ？
1054795278.en_literal: Heh. Even the gods should probably stop holding back.
1054795278.english: I'd be interested in seeing more of your blade work when you aren't holding back.

420305005.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
420305005.english: Well then, what's our next act?

482893569.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
482893569.jp_real: 敵に攻撃の機会を与えないようにするのがコツだな。
482893569.en_literal: The key is not to give the enemy an opening to attack.
482893569.english: The key is to give your opponents no quarter.

850131846.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
850131846.jp_real: どんな敵にも遅れは取らないが、決して満信はしない。
850131846.en_literal: I never fall behind any foe, but I will never become complacent either.
850131846.english: Not that I disagree, but take care not to underestimate your opponent.

619105009.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
619105009.en_literal: Heh heh heh... Did I surprise you?

493395509.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
493395509.jp_real: うん。クマ殺しという異名もあったな。そういえば。
493395509.en_literal: Hmm. I heard you had the alias "Bear Slayer," come to think of it.
493395509.english: Yes, but that was back in the day.

756328142.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
756328142.jp_real: そうだな。だからこそ、気を引き締めねばなるまい。
756328142.en_literal: That's right. That's why we must stay alert.
756328142.english: It's a strange feeling to be called lovely by a rose.

191325248.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
191325248.jp_real: ……ふふふ。無駄に視線は越えていないからな。
191325248.english: Well, I spend half my days on the battlefield.

202831345.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
202831345.jp_real: おっと、オクセズ切り込んでけ！
202831345.english: You have my support now and forevermore.

609853436.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
609853436.jp_real: そうだな、今のはなかなかだったぞ。
609853436.en_literal: That was quite something, wasn't it?

729940392.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
729940392.jp_real: 多少荒削りなところはあるがな。
729940392.en_literal: Heh heh... there are some rough edges, I suppose.
729940392.english: I am only a knight, like yourself.

271557884.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
271557884.jp_real: ああ、この剣は大切なものを守るために振るうものだからな。
271557884.en_literal: This sword... I wield it to protect what's precious.
271557884.english: It's because I fight for a good cause.

54303453.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
54303453.jp_real: ナルメア、期待に沿えるよう尽力する
54303453.en_literal: I'll do my best to keep up with you.
54303453.english: That's quite a lot to live up to.

868041562.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
868041562.jp_real: 奇伝の拳あってこそだったな
868041562.en_literal: It was only thanks to our fists clashing that we could reach this point.

361858705.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
361858705.jp_real: すべて合わせて見せようじゃないか
361858705.en_literal: Let's show them everything we've got!
361858705.english: No, it was our combination which led to victory.

506765147.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
506765147.jp_real: ふふ。まだまだ鈍るような腕ではないぞ。
506765147.en_literal: I'm not quite as weak as you think.
506765147.english: And a few centuries has taught you much.

549942614.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
549942614.jp_real: イドが背負う地と宿命。先達である俺が、支えねばなるまい。
549942614.en_literal: I'd rather die than let Id bear this burden alone. As his comrade, it's my duty to stand by his side.
549942614.english: You do not bear this burden alone.

1050507109.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
1050507109.jp_real: うーん、少々張り切りすぎてしまったか。
1050507109.en_literal: Hmm. I may have gotten a bit too eager.

362802901.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
362802901.jp_real: ああ、だからこそ剣の道は奥深いんだろ
362802901.en_literal: That's why the path of the sword is so profound, right?
362802901.english: Agreed. Every swordsman walks his own path.

362631269.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
362631269.jp_real: ふふっ、俺にはもったいない言葉だ
362631269.en_literal: Hmph. Those are words too good for me.
362631269.english: You waste such golden words on the likes of me.

765619381.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
765619381.jp_real: 参考にでもなったのならいいが
765619381.en_literal: If it was of any use to you, then that's fine.
765619381.english: I think you've got the wrong idea.

946482780.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
946482780.jp_real: いいや、十分だったと思うぞ。
946482780.en_literal: No, I think that was enough.
946482780.english: You did fine. Don't sell yourself short.

285360285.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
285360285.jp_real: 期待に応えられたのなら、幸いだ。
285360285.en_literal: If you were able to meet my expectations, then that's a relief.
285360285.english: I'm merely glad to have lived up to your expectations.

985118621.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
985118621.jp_real: この剣こそが俺の誓いだ。という答えではだめか？
985118621.en_literal: This sword is my vow. Isn't that an answer?
985118621.english: This sword is my other half. Does that suffice?

79805222.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
79805222.jp_real: それは心強い。頼んだぞ。
79805222.en_literal: That's the spirit. I'm counting on you.

454656808.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
454656808.jp_real: まだ戦いが続いてる。気を抜くなよ。
454656808.en_literal: The battle's not over yet. Don't let your guard down.
454656808.english: Captain, you're going to make me blush in sight of our enemies.

974832744.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
974832744.jp_real: もし、威圧感を与えてしまったのなら、すまない。
974832744.en_literal: If I've given you a sense of oppression, I'm sorry.
974832744.english: I do hope I'm not menacing to you.

365175975.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
365175975.en_literal: Huh? Let's go with a good mood.

470007022.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
470007022.jp_real: 承知した。次はドイツだ。

713367746.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
713367746.jp_real: ああ、俺もその意気込みに応えよう。
713367746.english: Perhaps we'll get a chance to find out.

619174440.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
619174440.english: Then I suppose all that's left is to try.

688302481.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
688302481.jp_real: 了解だ。思う存分暴れさせてもらおう。
688302481.en_literal: Understood. I'll let it run wild as much as you'd like.
688302481.english: We will strike fast and strike hard!

518200697.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
518200697.jp_real: お前も同じ心持ちだな
518200697.en_literal: Huh? I'm of the same mind!

414377906.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
414377906.jp_real: ジークフリート。頼りにしている。

561994902.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
561994902.en_literal: Well then, what do you say?
561994902.english: I'm quite good at covering my tracks.

372760972.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
372760972.jp_real: いつでも準備はできている

956745657.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
956745657.jp_real: しかし、紀伝の眼に宿る闘志はそうは語っていないようだが。
956745657.en_literal: But the wisdom in the eyes of the shrine doesn't seem to say so.
956745657.english: The look in your eyes says otherwise.

399646605.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
399646605.jp_real: それはこちらも同じ思いだ、ナルメア殿。
399646605.en_literal: I feel the same way, Narmaya.
399646605.english: And it is an honor to be fighting at yours, Lady Narmaya.

1069370589.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
1069370589.jp_real: この勢いのまま、次に備えよ。
1069370589.en_literal: With this momentum, prepare for what comes next.
1069370589.english: Well, let's not keep destiny waiting, shall we?

266006603.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
266006603.jp_real: ゼタの掃除術こそ相当なものだと思うぞ
266006603.en_literal: I'd say Zeta's skill is quite something.
266006603.english: I should ask the same of your spearwork.

754026609.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
754026609.jp_real: テナズケナレルウチワ ジャジャウマモタノモシイモノダ
754026609.en_literal: While I can be underestimated, even a jaywalker is reliable.
754026609.english: Once tamed, even the wildest stallion makes for a trustworthy companion.

47982369.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
47982369.english: I am very proud of you.

417871871.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
417871871.jp_real: 期待通りの働きはしよう

83867381.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
83867381.jp_real: そうは言うが、任されてほしいと顔に書いてあるぞ。
83867381.en_literal: You've got that "leave it to me" look written all over your face.
83867381.english: Look at my face. Does it seem like I want to do all the heavy lifting?

858694914.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
858694914.jp_real: お望みとあらば、いつでも手ほどきしてやろう
858694914.en_literal: If you're feeling generous, I'll gladly let you have it anytime.
858694914.english: Yes, we've vanquished all of the mid-evildoers!

101263956.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
101263956.jp_real: さって、それはどうかな？
101263956.english: Not the question we should be asking, is it?

692842517.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
692842517.en_literal: What? You're not even a parent.
692842517.english: I am ever at your service.

823344342.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
823344342.jp_real: あまり前のめりになりすぎだよ
823344342.en_literal: Don't get too ahead of yourself.
823344342.english: There's taking initiative, and then there's reckless abandon.

554314375.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
554314375.jp_real: 何？勘が当たっただけさ

24217667.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
24217667.jp_real: ああ、このまま押し通す！
24217667.en_literal: Hah! Let's push through like this!

486733864.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
486733864.jp_real: よい。先鋭ではあるが、次は俺がエスコートを買って出よう。
486733864.en_literal: Alright. Though I'm a knight, I'll be the one to escort you from now on.
486733864.english: Then by your leave, shall I escort you to the front lines?
